name: The White House
subject: How to secure our schools
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=97e8ac9b56b31016f81777c30f080eec3e88802f6b14a77d4172b690d63ba07415884e98be61c0e8929c8092cb419f8bedd70f6186ca31fa

How to secure our schools

After the horrific shooting at a Parkland, Florida, high school last month, President Donald J. Trump met with students, teachers, lawmakers, and local officials to hear every idea they had about how to keep violence out of America’s schools.

Every child in our Nation has a right to feel safe. To achieve that goal, the President will announce a series of actions to protect our children and their communities:

- Hardening our schools: The Administration will make sure our schools are safe and secure—just like our airports, stadiums, and government buildings—with better training and preparedness.
- Strengthening background checks and prevention: President Trump is supporting legislation and reforms to strengthen the background checks system and law enforcement operations.
- Reforming mental health programs: The President is proposing an expansion and reform of mental health programs, including those that help identify and treat individuals who may be a threat to themselves or others.
- Keeping the conversation going: In addition to these immediate actions, President Trump is establishing a Federal Commission on School Safety, chaired by Secretary of Education Betsy DeVos, to recommend policy and funding proposals for school violence prevention.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=97e8ac9b56b31016b8ebe41236cc46ea792ac79f1df7226d526dd1ae020aa74d1e26c346bc354decf8b3ce9239170e70f430b568e8131900
Watch First Lady Melania Trump meeting with Parkland student Kyle Kashuv.

California’s resistance

This week, the Department of Justice filed a lawsuit against the State of California to save lives and keep dangerous criminals off our streets. For far too long, California has obstructed Federal law and put the interests of criminals who are in United States illegally ahead of the well-being of American citizens.

Below is just one example of a dangerous criminal that California set free—despite the lawful request of U.S. Immigrations and Customs Enforcement (ICE) to hold him until Federal authorities could arrive:

On Aug. 2, 2017, the Santa Rosa Police Department arrested a citizen of Guatemala on charges of inflicting corporal injury to a spouse/cohabitant. That same day, ICE lodged a “detainer,” which includes a request to the local jail to notify ICE before the inmate is released.

The next day, the Sonoma County Jail provided ICE with only 24 minutes notice before it released the suspect—despite the fact that the jail is about 65 miles from the nearest ICE field office. On Aug. 18, 2017, the Santa Rosa Police Department arrested the same individual as a suspect in the murder of his alleged girlfriend.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=97e8ac9b56b310161a1084f5d44caa164dc8550753f8f9d3ac75f6ac0afc49ab961774d81fd3b0052faee24b79759745ff2110ab73dcf94c
See more stories of the life-and-death consequences of California’s resistance to Federal law.

The best jobs news in 2 decades

The opening months of 2018 has marked the strongest average monthly job growth in more than two decades, the Council of Economic Advisers wrote last week following the release of February employment data from the Bureau of Labor Statistics.

Nonfarm payroll employment rose by 313,000 last month, and average hourly earnings increased 2.6 percent since the same period last year. Since January 2017, 2.5 million jobs have been added to the economy.

“I mean, the only sector of the economy that got smaller in February was the Federal government,” Vice President Mike Pence joked in Cleveland, Ohio, on Friday.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=97e8ac9b56b31016a0f2e88607c1b50b3f466c3c086a01caa9c5ded9b5c8b6422fa0313874a0e0e84a4d03ce09a93d92195a10997983364c
Learn more about the best news on jobs in more than 2 decades.

Photo of the Day

First Lady Melania Trump and Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School student Kyle Kashuv | March 8, 2018 (Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks)

POTUS TODAY

Today, President Trump will host the 2017 World Series Champion Houston Astros. The President will then have lunch with Secretary of Energy Rick Perry.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=97e8ac9b56b310164536ae050fd89ae81c2706f3b4f2c4e79957604405476b0a5c2c0ea76bb418193d898745323b444efd94f853b6d2da93
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=97e8ac9b56b310161ca92a099af22576f6ac6c59c6b2029396bd097d2aa260f9ace97904507c6cdcd757c439221af5e7d49b5aded0e6d9a5
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4a7c4a15ac7adddcd045e62f377f9132c1608611dc5ad57a892fdf246c6a8e78c89eaacf769ade284fcc64e736489dd2f76f17b6f9d956e07
Unsubscribe

body:
Derek,

I'm reaching out to you today with a simple ask - [will you give my campaign a donation of any amount today?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=oJ%2B5A9XhGeoqHxY%2BGk80WaAIvw2TUsHr)

**The end of this month is the first public filing deadline of the 2018 election year, so the numbers we post will be visible to our supporters, to our peers, and to our opponents.**

[My team and I are setting a goal of 10,000 grassroots donations in the first quarter of 2018. Chip in any amount (even $1!) either for the first time or as a recommitment of your support to help us reach this goal >>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=8cRT6P2RTmOEHFe2NcfNdqAIvw2TUsHr)

**I _really_ do say this all the time - "it's not about the money, it's about the many."**

When our numbers go public after this month, I'm less concerned with the final amount. What I truly care about is how many people like you made an intentional act to stand up for what you believe in and to actively choose an America that is driven by love, not hate. Just remember: Virginia is for lovers, not haters! [So look - I really want to hit this major milestone in our campaign with you. Will you chip in any (and I mean _any_) amount to count towards 10,000 individual online contributions in 2018?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Jjv4s3gun8UlJ5PQfAO7AYQLKjLmECvV)

body:
Tomorrow is the Pennsylvania special election. Stand with Conor right now to help him win.
---
If you've been waiting to make a difference in tomorrow's special election in Pennsylvania, this is your last chance, Derek.

**Split a $10 donation between Conor Lamb and the DNC before polls open tomorrow morning. Your contribution will help elect Conor and Democrats nationwide -- and time is running out to have an impact in this race.**

** This special election is our opportunity to flip the first House seat of this election cycle and deal a huge blow to Republicans who have spent MILLIONS of dollars to defend this seat.

Conor is within striking distance of pulling off a shocking upset in a district the GOP has held for decades -- and he's counting on your support before voters go to the polls tomorrow.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
We have ten Democratic Senators up for re-election in states that Donald Trump won -- and they need your support right now.
---
[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20180312-Battleground_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Team,

We have 10 Democratic Senators up for re-election in states that Donald Trump won -- and we've got to make sure we re-elect every single one of them.

Senators like Sherrod Brown, who spoke out on the Senate floor to stop the GOP tax scam and prevent Republicans from raising taxes on the middle class.

And Claire McCaskill, a fighter for working families who called out Republicans for failing to hold a single hearing on their Obamacare repeal plan.

Or Tammy Baldwin, who has stood up to special interests and is already facing millions in attack ad spending from right-wing PACs.

[**Pitch in $1 right now to help re-elect all of our Democratic Senate champions, including the TEN up for re-election in states Trump won.**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20180312-Battleground_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Our Democratic Senators are standing up for working families and fighting hard to stop the GOP from stacking the deck in favor of the wealthy and powerful.

But as they face tough re-election battles this year, your support is critical to ensuring our champions like Sherrod, Claire, and Tammy can continue leading the fight for working families in the Senate.

[**Contribute $1 right now to help all our Democratic Senators fend off the GOP super PAC attacks and win their re-election campaigns to keep fighting for working families.**](http://action.dscc. Team DSCC

name: Dan Lipinski
subject: We need net neutrality back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress |
body:
Peter — this is important.

Earlier this year, Trump’s Federal Communication Commission
(FCC) voted along party lines to eliminate net neutrality rules.

These are the safeguards that keep our internet free and open
for everyone.

Without these safeguards, access to content and information
will be sold to the highest bidder. Innovation, freedom of
expression, and fair and equal access are all casualties of the
FCC’s decision.

My colleagues and I have vigorously defended net neutrality
in Congress, but now we need as many voices as possible to join
us in our effort to keep it alive.

That’s why we’re calling for Congress to overturn the FCC’s
elimination of net neutrality rules. The consequences for
consumers are too great; the power given to ISPs is too much.
Please, Peter, SIGN ON to join us.
( https://act.myngp.com/Forms/2151884284115617536?fn=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&ln=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&add1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&add2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&em=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&pc=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&ci=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&st=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&hp=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&oc=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&ep=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

When the FCC gutted these internet protections, it continued
a long-standing trend of anti-consumerism that runs to the core
of Trump’s administration.

We can’t count on Trump’s GOP to protect anyone except their
big-business backers. If the internet is going to stay open and
free, it’s up to us to join together and demand the FCC reverse
its decision immediately.

Peter, if you believe in a free and
open internet, sign on here to demand that Congress reverse the
FCC’s elimination of net neutrality rules.
( https://act.myngp.com/Forms/2151884284115617536?fn=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&ln=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&add1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&add2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&em=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&pc=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&ci=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&st=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&hp=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&oc=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&ep=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c51cd/24c69fd9/1ffb6e107/1889d9f5/2482588582/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFRO28N_digital_email_20180312_LastChanceEAC_inact&source=WQEFRO28N_digital_email_20180312_LastChanceEAC_inact")

Peter,

This is our final Membership Week of the year!

**[Show our women that you have their backs by becoming a member for 2018.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c51cd/24c69fd9/1ffb6e107/1889d9f6/2482588582/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180312_email_MarchMembershipWeek?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Show+our+women+that+you+have+their+backs&utm_campaign=WQEFRO28N_digital_email_20180312_LastChanceEAC_inact&source=WQEFRO28N_digital_email_20180312_LastChanceEAC_inact")**
[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c51cd/24c69fd9/1ffb6e107/1889d9f7/2482588582/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180312_email_MarchMembershipWeek?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=WQEFRO28N_digital_email_20180312_LastChanceEAC_inact&source=WQEFRO28N_digital_email_20180312_LastChanceEAC_inact")
This is not a moment that you want to spend on the sidelines.

2018 is our year.

Our candidates have already won four special elections for state legislative seats, including Patty Schachtner, who flipped a seat in a district that voted for Trump by _17 points_.

And last week, all five of our women in Texas made it through the first stage of the primaries -- two won outright, and three are headed into runoffs.

But to keep adding to our win column, _everyone_ needs to step up.

**Donate $3 to become a member for 2018, and we'll send you the official 2018 Membership Card:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Last-2018-Membership-Week](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c51cd/24c69fd9/1ffb6e107/1889d9f0/2482588582/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180312_email_MarchMembershipWeek?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgLast2018Membersh&utm_campaign=WQEFRO28N_digital_email_20180312_LastChanceEAC_inact&source=WQEFRO28N_digital_email_20180312_LastChanceEAC_inact")**

Thanks -- and go team!

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List

name: Team Inslee
subject: Let Jay know you're standing up to Trump. [Sign on]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Jay's not expecting an invitation back to the White House any time soon. | [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79ca0/2f5ea88d/7310932e/2cbc9018/3043121075/VEsH/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/stay-with-jay-against-trump?utm_source=ema_2018-03-12_post-freeze-3&source=ema_2018-03-12_post-freeze-3&utm_campaign=post-freeze-3&utm_medium=ema") Friend, Jay's making our state the center of resistance to the repressive policies of the Trump administration. During the last legislative session, we accomplished some big things together: Protecting net neutrality in Washington state, passing a suite of bills to enhance voting rights, and expanding access to reproductive health care. Rather than cave to extremism, Jay is using the power of his office to defend our Washington state values against the chaos from D.C. and pass an agenda that puts working people first. He's showing us what progressives can accomplish in the age of Donald Trump. [**Will you join us in showing Jay we have his back as he stands up to the Trump administration? Add your name here.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79ca0/2f5ea88d/7310932e/2cbc9018/3043121075/VEsE/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/stay-with-jay-against-trump?utm_source=ema_2018-03-12_post-freeze-3&source=ema_2018-03-12_post-freeze-3&utm_campaign=post-freeze-3&utm_medium=ema") We recently saw Jay in action at the White House, speaking truth to power. Donald Trump hated being called out, but Jay refused to be intimidated. Instead, he made it clear the president needs to spend more time getting things done -- and listening to Americans -- than tweeting. Jay told President Trump the American people deserve better. **And while Jay's not expecting an invitation back to the White House any time soon, he's going to keep on fighting for hardworking Washingtonians even if it infuriates President Trump.** At this pivotal moment, Jay needs to know we're with him as he takes on the Trump administration and its abuses. body:
Wanted to make sure you saw Tim's note! Attached it below just in case.

**The first public deadline of the year is at the end of this month, which means everyone will see our numbers in a matter of weeks.**

Our goal is to post [10,000 small-dollar online donations](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=9rsZWfPi3ovCej5pQtrqC1PId17ODs9F) \- and we're more than halfway there! Whether you've donated before or were waiting to donate for the first time, we would LOVE to be able to count you in this major milestone.

[Read Tim's note below about what small-dollar grassroots donations mean to him and chip in any amount you feel comfortable with! Each contribution, whether from a first time donor or a frequent donor, gets us closer to our milestone! >>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=e60TWIZ5Vcwoz0sBq3Sj2lPId17ODs9F)

Thanks!

_Team Kaine_ | | [**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=7wzCzeH0mm%2FsHZZb6bVBD1PId17ODs9F)
---
\------ORIGINAL MESSAGE------

**FROM: Tim Kaine
SUBJECT: I have a simple question for you**
Derek,

I'm reaching out to you today with a simple ask - [will you give my campaign a donation of any amount today?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=b%2BmwG4K7yzFb%2FB15kSa%2FJ1PId17ODs9F)

**The end of this month is the first public filing deadline of the 2018 election year, so the numbers we post will be visible to our supporters, to our peers, and to our opponents.**

[My team and I are setting a goal of 10,000 individual, small dollar, grassroots donations for 2018 so far. Chip in any amount (even $1!) either for the first time or as a recommitment of your support to help us reach this goal >>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=bcaAAYA4zqQ5LGMWXCpzJFPId17ODs9F)

**I _really_ do say this all the time - "it's not about the money, it's about the many."**

When our numbers go public after this month, I'm less concerned with the final amount. What I truly care about is how many people like you made an intentional act to stand up for what you believe in and to actively choose an America that is driven by love, not hate. Just remember: Virginia is for lovers, not haters!
[So look - I really want to hit this major milestone in our campaign with you. Will you chip in any (and I mean any) amount to count towards 10,000 individual online contributions of 2018?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=BFWjRJ3KZNhG%2BRPQdtd0mHIz4Wso%2FCMW)

[Chip in $5 to our campaign today >>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=B%2ByFAyrdcIEcLiYoCtku%2FFPId17ODs9F)

[Chip in $25 to our campaign today >>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=JS%2FXF2IOKo5R5lmQlAEMbVPId17ODs9F)

[Chip in $50 to our campaign today >>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=XZgbD1JeTUjIkqb3OlPTXFPId17ODs9F)

[Chip in $100 to our campaign today >>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=8nlk%2BcjcXu540vhan%2BVGJVPId17ODs9F)

[Chip in another amount to our campaign today >>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=FK5Pj98WW5i%2BESIO4EFF2lPId17ODs9F)
With gratitude,

_Tim_

Since day one of the Trump administration, _Roe v. Wade_ has been on the chopping block.
**The House passed a ban on abortion after 20 weeks, and Mike Pence has been touting the "great progress" toward rolling back access to reproductive health care.**
The truth is, Republicans have never been closer to undoing the progress we've made for access to women's health care. **Senator Hassan is leading the charge to protect reproductive rights, but she can 't do it alone. [Will you please give $3 or more right now to join the fight?](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf24/2a380d31/40880fd/f1e463/1334097070/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOC1yZXByb2R1Y3RpdmUtcmlnaHRzLWZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxODAzMTJfUmVwcm9SaWdodHNGUl9hY3QiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018-reproductive-rights-fr?refcode=e20180312_ReproRightsFR_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**

Team,
